title: Skinny Love
why_this_song: Skinny Love by Birdy (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "And I told you to be patient"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Come on, skinny love, just last the year"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And I told you to be kind"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Cut out all the ropes and let me fall"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "And I told you to be patient"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I told you to be patient
And I told you to be fine
And I told you to be balanced
And I told you to be kind
Come on, skinny love, just last the year
Pour a little salt, we were never here
My, my, my, my, my, my, my, my, my, my, my
Staring at the sink of blood and crushed veneer

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "told" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "told" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "skinny" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "skinny" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Come on, skinny love, just last the year
And in the morning, I'll be with you
And I told you to be balanced

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Pour a little salt, we were never here
Come on skinny love, what happened here?
And now, all your love is wasted

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Skinny Love" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Skinny Love" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
